{"id":709,"date":"2026-07-10T08:55:42","date_gmt":"2026-07-10T08:55:42","guid":{"rendered":"http:\/\/beesayatv.test\/?p=709"},"modified":"2026-07-16T09:38:56","modified_gmt":"2026-07-16T09:38:56","slug":"easy-hiking-trails-in-cebu","status":"publish","type":"post","link":"http:\/\/beesayatv.test\/easy-hiking-trails-in-cebu\/","title":{"rendered":"Easy Hiking Trails in Cebu"},"content":{"rendered":"\n

This page is a live list of curated trail reports currently classified as EASY<\/strong> within the beesayatv trail database. It brings together documented routes that share broadly similar characteristics based on the solo hiking trail classification system<\/a>.<\/p>\n\n\n

  • Cambanog Falls | Dumanjug<\/a><\/li>
  • Camp 7 Farmland Trails | Minglanilla Part 1<\/a><\/li>
  • Camp 8 Backtrails | Minglanilla Part 3<\/a><\/li>
  • Guindaruhan-Estaka Trail Loop | Guindaruhan, Minglanilla<\/a><\/li>
  • Malingin Rock | Cotcot River, Liloan<\/a><\/li>
  • Mini Switzerland | Campinsa, Talisay<\/a><\/li>
  • Mt. Kalatkat | Sayao, Sibonga<\/a><\/li>
  • Radar Trail | Sudlon 1 \/ Bagakay, Toledo<\/a><\/li>
  • Toong Forest Trail | Toong, Pardo \/ Mahayahay<\/a><\/li><\/ul><\/div>

    NOTE: Trail conditions may change over time. Read the individual trail report for the complete documentation of each recorded hike.<\/p><\/div>\n\n\n\n

    Additional trail reports may appear here over time as more routes are documented and classified as EASY<\/strong>. To view the other trails, head over to the Trail Atlas<\/a> page. <\/p>\n","protected":false},"excerpt":{"rendered":"

    This page is a live list of curated trail reports currently classified as EASY within the beesayatv trail database. It brings together documented routes that share broadly similar characteristics based on the solo hiking trail classification system.
